Use this data source to query ECS disks.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_disks" "example" {
  region = "tokyo-a"
  name   = "example-disk"
}

output "first_disk_id" {
  value = try(data.edgenext_ecs_disks.example.disks[0].id, null)
}
```

Argument Reference

* `region` - (Required) Region.
* `name` - (Optional) Disk name filter.
* `ids` - (Optional) Disk ID list filter.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `disks` - Disk list returned by API.
